scripts.dev:mobile:pods: env -u npm_config_prefix zsh -lc 'export PATH="$HOME/.gem/ruby/2.6.0/bin:$PATH" && cd apps/zephyr-mobile/ios && pod install'
scripts.dev:mobile:android: env -u npm_config_prefix zsh -lc 'cd apps/zephyr-mobile && flutter run --dart-define=API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000'
scripts.dev:mobile:ios: env -u npm_config_prefix zsh -lc 'cd apps/zephyr-mobile && flutter run --dart-define=API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000'
